app.partners: A service of Caritas and its partners

reg.title: Registration
reg.question: What topic are you seeking counselling for?
reg.subtitle: Choose a topic from our range of counselling services.
reg.noneSelected: Please choose a topic to continue.

postcode.title: To be able to advise you as best as possible, we need your postcode
postcode.why1: know the help available around your place of residence
postcode.why2: know the laws of your federal state

center.title: Choose consulting center
center.advisesIn: This counseling center advises you in: German (DE)

register.title: Capture login data
register.subtitle: To protect your anonymity, we advise you not to use your real name or initials.
register.privacyAfter: . This website uses cookies for authentication and navigation.

message.title: Send request
message.subtitle: Briefly describe your concern. You can continue writing anytime later.

eltern-und-familie.title: Parents & Family
eltern-und-familie.desc: Whether parenting questions, conflicts or family crises – here you'll find understanding support.

kinder-und-jugendliche.title: Children & Adolescents
kinder-und-jugendliche.desc: When everyday life gets to be too much – young people find help and a listening ear here.

kinder-und-jugend-reha.title: Children's & Youth Rehabilitation
kinder-und-jugend-reha.desc: For children and young people who want to regain strength after illness or strain.

kuren-fuer-muetter-und-vaeter.title: Health Cures for Mothers & Fathers
kuren-fuer-muetter-und-vaeter.desc: Exhausted parents deserve rest – cure programmes help you find your way back to yourself.

jungen-und-maennerberatung.title: Counselling for Boys & Men
jungen-und-maennerberatung.desc: A safe space for men and boys to talk openly about worries and burdens.

schwangerschaft.title: Pregnancy
schwangerschaft.desc: Whether questions, uncertainty or difficult circumstances – we are here for you in every situation.

u25-suizidpraevention.title: U25 Suicide Prevention
u25-suizidpraevention.desc: When life becomes too hard – young people find immediate support and stability here.

leben-im-alter.title: Living in Old Age
leben-im-alter.desc: Growing older brings new questions – we help you shape everyday life well and with dignity.

rechtliche-betreuung-und-vorsorge.title: Legal Guardianship & Advance Care
rechtliche-betreuung-und-vorsorge.desc: So that important decisions are settled – support with powers of attorney and guardianship.

hospiz-und-palliativberatung.title: Hospice & Palliative Counselling
hospiz-und-palliativberatung.desc: Support at the end of life – for those affected and their loved ones in a difficult time.

trauerberatung.title: Grief Counselling
trauerberatung.desc: Grief needs time and space – we accompany you with empathy through the pain of loss.

migration.title: Migration
migration.desc: Arriving in a new country is not easy – we support you on the way into your new life.

aus-rueck-und-weiterwanderung.title: Emigration, Return & Onward Migration
aus-rueck-und-weiterwanderung.desc: Whether returning or moving on – advice on your residence status and centre of life.

behinderung-und-psychische-beeintraechti.title: Disability & Mental Health
behinderung-und-psychische-beeintraechti.desc: Living with disability or mental strain – we help you find everyday support and services.

sucht.title: Addiction
sucht.desc: Addiction affects the whole family – confidential counselling for those affected and relatives.

hiv-und-aids.title: HIV & Aids
hiv-und-aids.desc: Discreet, non-judgemental and empathetic – we stand by you with HIV and Aids.

allgemeine-sozialberatung.title: General Social Counselling
allgemeine-sozialberatung.desc: For questions about benefits, authorities or difficult situations – we are here for you.

schulden.title: Debt
schulden.desc: Debt can be overwhelming – together we'll find a way out of financial distress.

straffaelligkeit.title: Offending & Criminal Justice
straffaelligkeit.desc: A fresh start after a mistake – support for those affected and their families, without judgement.
